name: Titan's Resolve
desc: Gain X% Attack Damage and X% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to X times. At full stacks, gain X% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.

name: Sunfire Cape

name: Sterak's Gage

name: Adaptive Helm
desc: Gain an additional X% Mana from all sources. The holder gains an additional bonus based on their Role: Tanks and Fighters: Gain X Armor and Magic Resistance. Other Roles: Gain X% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

name: Locket of the Iron Solari
desc: Combat start: The holder and allies within X hexes in the same row gain a X Shield, X Armor, and X Magic Resist for X seconds. ​​ [Support item]

name: Spirit Visage
desc: Regenerate X% of missing Health each second.

name: Hand of Justice
desc: Gain 2 effects: X% Attack Damage and X% Ability Power. X% Omnivamp. While above X% health, double the Attack Damage and Ability Power. While below X% Health, double the Omnivamp.

name: Edge of Night
desc: At X% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal X% missing health.

name: Knight's Vow
desc: Extra %i:scaleArmor% +X Holder is also a Knight [Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Zeke's Herald
desc: Combat start: Grant %i:scaleAS% X% Attack Speed to the holder and allies within 2 hexes in the same row. ​​ [Support item]

name: Quicksilver
desc: Combat Start: Gain immunity to crowd control for X seconds. Gain X% stacking Attack Speed every second.

name: Crownguard
desc: Combat Start: Gain a X% max Health Shield for X seconds. When the Shield expires, gain X% Ability Power.

name: Steadfast Heart
desc: Gain X% Durability. While above X% Health, instead gain X% Durability. X

name: Thief's Gloves
desc: Each round: Equip 2 random items. [Consumes 3 item slots.] X

name: Lesser Mirrored Persona

name: Innervating Locket

name: The Indomitable
desc: The holder's Move Speed is drastically reduced. Gain X% max Health, stun immunity, and pull the current target into melee range.

name: Shadow Puppet
desc: Spawn a clone that copies the holder's items. The clone has X% max Health and deals X% damage. [Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Withered Relic
desc: Combat Start: Increase the holder's max Health by X but keep their current Health the same.

name: Eternal Pact

desc: Attacks deal X% of the holder's max Health as bonus physical damage. For every X% missing Health, gain X% Attack Speed.

name: Lich Bane
desc: The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals X bonus magic damage. Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Forbidden Idol
desc: Shields have X% of their value converted to max Health instead.

name: Mirrored Persona

name: Fishbones
desc: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

desc: Attacks deal X% of the holder's max Health plus X% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

name: Aegis of Dusk
desc: Every X seconds, steal X Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal X% of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage. If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every X seconds instead. Damage incr

name: Unending Despair
desc: Whenever a Shield on the holder breaks, X% of that Shield's initial value is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

name: Mending Echoes
desc: Increase healing on the holder by X%. When the holder gives or receives a heal, grant X% of the heals value to the lowest health ally as well.

name: Cursed Blade
desc: Attacks reduce the target's max Health by X%. X attacks on the same target reduces their star level by 1.

name: Luden's Tempest
desc: X% of overkill damage plus X is dealt as magic damage to the three enemies nearest the target.

name: Spectral Cutlass
desc: Combat start: Teleport the holder to the mirrored hex on the enemy's side of the board. After X seconds, the holder returns to their original location.

name: Rapid Firecannon
desc: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

name: Statikk Shiv
desc: Every 3rd attack deals X + X% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

name: Aegis of Dawn
desc: Every X seconds, steal X Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal X% of the holder's Armor. If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every X seconds instead. Healing increases based on Stage.

name: Dawncore
desc: Reduce the holder's max Mana by X. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by X%, to a minimum of X.

name: Lightshield Crest
desc: Every X seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for X% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for X seconds. On death grants this shield to all allies.

name: Blighting Jewel
desc: Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by X. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder X Mana instead. Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every X seconds.

name: Talisman Of Ascension
desc: After X seconds gain X% max Health and X% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

name: Suspicious Trench Coat
desc: Once per combat at X% Health, the holder splits into 3 copies of themself each with X% of their max Health. [Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Mittens
desc: Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow , Burn , and Wound . {{TFT_Keyword_Chill}} {{TFT_Keyword_Burn}} {{TFT_Keyword_Wound}}

name: Wit's End

name: Horizon Focus

name: Prowler's Claw

name: Kayle's Exaltation
desc: After X seconds of combat, this and all completed items on the holder become Radiant.

name: Evelynn's Instinct
desc: When switching targets, blink to the next target. Attacks and Abilities execute the holder's target below X% of their Health. Kills grant the holder X% Attack Speed decaying over X seconds.

name: Soraka's Miracle
desc: The first X times the holder drops below X% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for X% of their max Health. If the holder survives player combat, gain X player Health for each Miracle this combat.

name: Varus's Obsession
desc: Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains X% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power. The Soulmate heals for X% of damage the holder deals.

name: Ahri's Aura

desc: Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by X. (Cooldown X seconds) Recommended users: Master Yi and Pyke.

name: Target-Lock Optics
desc: The holder's first attack on each enemy deals X (%i:scaleAD%) additional damage. Recommended users: Pyke and Master Yi

name: Drone Uplink
desc: A drone repeats X% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every X seconds. Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

name: Semiconductor
desc: Every X attacks and every X times being attacked, zap the X nearest enemies, dealing X% of enemy Health as magic damage. Recommended users: Gragas and Master Yi.

name: Sympathetic Implant
desc: Every X seconds, gain X additional Mana Regen. Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

name: Biomatter Preserver
desc: Gain X% max Health and deploy X Life Orbs. Every X seconds of combat, one drops restoring X% of the holder's missing Health. Recommended user: Gragas.
